mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, u.nickname, c.content, c.create_time FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.type = #{type} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, target_id, type, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetId}, #{type}, #{content})
